2606.29898.title: Critical Interval MSE: Toward Reliable Offline Validation for Robot Manipulation Policies
2606.29898.paper_summary: Real-world evaluation is the gold standard for robot policies because it tests them against the physical conditions and deployment challenges they are ultimately designed to handle. However, real-world evaluation is also the bottleneck for iterating on robot policies: it is costly, difficult to reproduce, and often too sparse to reliably compare nearby model variants. A straightforward proxy for performance is validation loss on expert demonstrations, but this proxy is often poorly correlated with real-world performance. In this paper, we introduce Critical Interval MSE (CI-MSE), an intuitively simple yet effective offline validation metric. CI-MSE restricts error computation to task-critical segments and pairs it with simple action-alignment procedures that better match rollout-time behavior. Across simulation and real-world experiments, CI-MSE yields a stronger correlation between validation error and rollout performance than raw MSE. Across a wide range of policy checkpoints, CI-MSE achieves a Spearman's rank correlation of $-0.87$, much closer to the ideal value of $-1$ than raw MSE's $-0.61$, demonstrating a significant improvement. We show through sensitivity analysis that our metric is robust to a wide range of hyperparameters. We further study the effectiveness of CI-MSE under evaluation distribution shifts and suggest design boundaries when using this metric. In summary, this paper provides a simple and reliable offline validation tool for accelerating policy iteration. Project webpage: https://ci-mse.github.io/
2606.29898.paper_summary_zh: 真實世界的評估是機器人政策的黃金標準，因為它將這些政策測試於它們最終設計要處理的物理條件和部署挑戰之下。<lb/>然而，真實世界的評估也是機器人政策迭代的瓶頸：它成本高昂，難以重現，且通常過於稀疏，無法可靠地比較相近的模型變體。<lb/>一個簡單的性能代理是專家示範的驗證損失，但這個代理通常與真實世界的性能相關性較差。<lb/>在這篇論文中，我們介紹了關鍵區間均方誤差（Critical Interval MSE, CI-MSE），這是一個直觀簡單但有效的離線驗證指標。<lb/>CI-MSE將誤差計算限制在任務關鍵的區段，並與簡單的動作對齊程序配對，更好地匹配滾動時間行為。<lb/>在模擬和真實世界的實驗中，CI-MSE在驗證誤差與滾動性能之間產生了比原始均方誤差更強的相關性。<lb/>在廣泛的政策檢查點中，CI-MSE達到了$-0.87$的斯皮爾曼等級相關性，這比原始均方誤差的$-0.61$更接近理想值$-1$，顯示出顯著的改進。<lb/>我們通過敏感性分析顯示，我們的指標對廣泛的超參數範圍是穩健的。<lb/>我們進一步研究了CI-MSE在評估分佈變化下的有效性，並在使用此指標時建議設計邊界。<lb/>總之，這篇論文提供了一個簡單可靠的離線驗證工具，以加速政策迭代。<lb/>項目網頁：https://ci-mse.github.io/
2606.29898.author: Haoxu Huang et.al.
2606.29898.authors: Haoxu Huang, Tongsam Zheng, Yifan Chen, Jiacheng You, Yang Gao
